lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Hi, welcome to Gnomeball. It's pretty simple really: You take the ball from me, charge at the gnome defence and try to throw the ball through the net using your ranged skill.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: It's a rough game but great fun. It's also great for improving agility. So do you fancy a game?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks too dangerous for me!

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: You may be right, we've seen humans die on this field.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, I'll have a go.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Great stuff! There are few rules to Gnomeball, so it can get a bit rough.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: You can pass to the green winger gnomes. Then you can make a run and they'll pass back. Otherwise, if you're feeling brave, you can just charge and dodge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: The main aim is to leave with no broken limbs. I think you should be fine.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Peeeeeeeeep

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Hi, welcome back to Gnomeball. Would you like to hear the rules again?

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: It's pretty simple really: You take the ball from me, charge at the gnome defence and try to throw the ball through the net using your ranged skill.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: It's a rough game but great fun. It's also great for improving agility.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: You can pass to the green winger gnomes. Then you can make a run and they'll pass back. Otherwise, if you're feeling brave, you can just charge and dodge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: The main aim is to leave with no broken limbs. I think you should be fine.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Ahh I see you have your own ball. We can't play with that; I'll give it back when you leave.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Peeeeeeeeep

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just want to play

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Okay... Let's play GNOMEBALL!

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Ahh I see you have your own ball. We can't play with that; I'll give it back when you leave.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Peeeeeeeeep

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't want to play.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Okay, never mind. Maybe next time...

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: You have a ball in play. Do you need to hear the rules again?

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: It's pretty simple really: You take the ball from me, charge at the gnome defence and try to throw the ball through the net using your ranged skill.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: It's a rough game but great fun. It's also great for improving agility.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: You can pass to the green winger gnomes. Then you can make a run and they'll pass back. Otherwise, if you're feeling brave, you can just charge and dodge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: The main aim is to leave with no broken limbs. I think you should be fine.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Ahh I see you have your own ball. We can't play with that; I'll give it back when you leave.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: The ball you have in your hand is fine to play with... Game on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Okay, good luck.

sections.title: If the gnomeball is out of play

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Have a new ball!

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Ahh I see you have your own ball. We can't play with that; I'll give it back when you leave.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Peeeeeeeeep

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Wrong answer!

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Well done!

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Right, you haven't finished quite yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ugh.

lines.speaker: Gnome ball referee
lines.text: Answer this for me.
